title: Watch for missing table content in 311 KB search eval
description:
Task 3 of the 311 KB ingestion spike stripped tables via remove('table') before toMarkdown() because Turndown's GFM fallback emits raw HTML for tables whose cells contain block-level content (lists, divs). That fallback leaks <table>, <tr>, <td>, <span style=...> into the indexed body, which breaks search.

Salesforce Knowledge articles in this corpus use tables mostly as formatting scaffolds rather than real tabular data, so stripping them seems acceptable. But we should verify during search-quality evaluation: run queries whose answers might live inside a table (eligibility thresholds, fee amounts, service hours by day) and see if recall suffers.

If eval shows we're missing useful table content, revisit the pipeline. Options:
- Custom Turndown rule that always emits GFM tables regardless of cell content
- unwrap non-phrasing cell content (ul/div) before toMarkdown so GFM sees phrasing-only cells
- Post-processing step that extracts cell text into paragraph form

Files:
- apps/api/scripts/ingest-311-kb.ts (parseKbHtml definition)
- docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-13-311-kb-ingestion.md (Known limitations)
- packages/parse/src/markdown.ts (where Turndown+GFM lives)

title: Fix TS1343 on import.meta.url in 311 KB ingest script
description:
apps/api/scripts/ingest-311-kb.ts:158 uses 'import.meta.url === pathToFileURL(process.argv[1]).href' as a module-entry guard. Under strict 'tsc --noEmit' across the api package, this triggers TS1343 (The 'import.meta' meta-property is only allowed when the '--module' option is 'es2020', 'es2022', 'esnext', 'system', 'node16', 'nodenext', or 'preserve'). Vite-node compiles and runs it fine, which is why vitest stays green and the script executes correctly — but CI or any strict type-check pass will fail.

Fix is a module target bump in apps/api/tsconfig.json (or root tsconfig.json) to module: ES2020 or later. Keep an eye out for regressions in other files that might rely on CommonJS-style module behavior under the old setting.

Introduced in Task 1 of the 311 KB ingest spike (branch wip/311-kb-ingestion). Agreed to defer to post-spike cleanup.

Files:
- apps/api/scripts/ingest-311-kb.ts (line 158, the guard)
- apps/api/tsconfig.json (target of the fix)
- tsconfig.json (alternative target)
